instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise the cable handle up to shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia frontal elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia frontal ombro elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia hammer rosca (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:2 Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the cable rope attachment back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia high pulley acima da cabeça tríceps extensão
name_en: cable high pulley overhead tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with both hands and extend your arms overhead.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia high remada (kneeling)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Kneel down in front of the cable machine and grab the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit back on your heels, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the bar towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Adução de quadril na polia
instructions: Step:1 Attach the ankle cuff to your ankle and stand facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Position yourself far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Place your hands on the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your leg straight, slowly move your leg across your body towards the midline.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia inclinado supino supino
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys.
Step:3 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them to shoulder height.
Step:5 Push the handles forward and upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia inclinado supino remada
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley.
Step:2 Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:4 Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:6 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia inclinado fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia inclinado fly (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Set up a stability ball at an incline angle.
Step:2 Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys of a cable machine.
Step:3 Sit on the stability ball facing away from the machine, with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:4 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:5 Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:6 With a controlled motion, bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:7 Continue the motion until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia inclinado pushdown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean forward slightly and keep your back straight.
Step:5 Pull the bar down towards your thighs by extending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia inclinado tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Attach a straight bar to the cable.
Step:3 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Step:5 Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:6 Bend your elbows and lower the bar behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia judo flip
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder.
Step:6 Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center.
Step:7 Repeat the movement on the opposite side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Keep your upper arm close to your body and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Extend your forearm backward, straightening your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia kneeling abdominal
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia kneeling rear delt remada (with rope) (male)
name_en: cable kneeling rear delt row (with rope) (male)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause.
Step:5 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia kneeling tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and bring your hands to the sides of your head.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Extend your forearms by contracting your triceps until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia dorsal pulldown full range of motion
name_en: cable lat pulldown full range of motion
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads.
Step:2 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia lateral pulldown (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia lateral pulldown with v-bar
instructions: Step:1 Sit down on the cable pulldown machine and grab the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Adjust the knee pad so that your thighs are secured under it.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar down towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your back muscles at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly return the v-bar to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia lateral elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia low fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:6 Reverse the motion and slowly return your arms to the starting position, keeping tension on your chest muscles throughout.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia low sentado remada
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia deitado bíceps rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia deitado pegada fechada rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar towards your chest by contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia deitado extensão pullover (with rope attachment)
name_en: cable lying extension pullover (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine and set the pulley at the highest position.
Step:2 Lie down on a bench with your head towards the cable machine.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the rope behind your head while maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the rope back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia deitado fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia deitado tríceps extensão v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Lie down on a flat bench facing up, with your head towards the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the rope handle towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia middle fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach cables to both sides of a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a slight forward lean.
Step:5 Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the center, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia unilateral curvado remada
name_en: cable one arm bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with one hand, palm facing inward, and extend your arm fully.
Step:4 Pull the cable handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side, until your hand reaches your lower chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia unilateral rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia unilateral declinado peito fly
name_en: cable one arm decline chest fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:4 With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to your left arm and repeat the exercise.

name: Na polia unilateral fly on exercise ball
name_en: cable one arm fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia unilateral inclinado fly on exercise ball
name_en: cable one arm incline fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back against an incline bench.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbow, slowly lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Na polia unilateral inclinado supino
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Step:5 Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia unilateral inclinado supino on exercise ball
name_en: cable one arm incline press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back resting against an incline bench.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at a 90-degree angle with your elbow bent.
Step:3 Press the cable handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Na polia unilateral lateral bent-over
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing a cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with one hand and step back to create tension on the cable.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Slowly bring your arm back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia unilateral lateral elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia unilateral preacher rosca
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

name: Na polia unilateral supino on exercise ball
name_en: cable one arm press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Na polia unilateral pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your lat muscle.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.

name: Na polia unilateral reverso preacher rosca
name_en: cable one arm reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

name: Na polia unilateral straight costas high remada (kneeling)
name_en: cable one arm straight back high row (kneeling)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Kneel down facing the cable machine and grab the handle with one hand.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:8 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.

name: Na polia unilateral tríceps pushdown
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar attachment at chest height.
Step:2 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Start with your arm fully extended and perpendicular to the floor.
Step:6 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and push the bar down until your arm is fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Na polia acima da cabeça rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia acima da cabeça rosca on exercise ball
name_en: cable overhead curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold the cable handle with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:3 Slowly curl the cable down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia acima da cabeça tríceps extensão (rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at a high position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and bring your hands above your head.
Step:4 Keep your upper arms close to your head and your elbows pointing forward.
Step:5 Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia palm rotational remada
instructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Step back to create tension on the cable, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your palms to face upwards as you do so.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia preacher rosca
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia supino on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold the cable handles at chest height with your palms facing down and your elbows bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and press the cable handles forward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly release the tension and bring the cable handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia puxada through (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grab the rope attachment with both hands and step forward, creating tension in the cable.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and lower your upper body until it is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to pull your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured.
Step:2 Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia pulldown (pro dorsal bar)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia pulldown bíceps rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia pushdown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia pushdown (straight braço) v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your back straight as you exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia pushdown (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley on a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and push the rope downward by extending your elbows until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position by allowing your elbows to flex.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rear delt remada (stirrups)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.

name: Na polia rear delt remada (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rear drive
instructions: Step:1 Attach a handle to a low pulley cable machine and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows stationary, pull the handle back towards your body, squeezing your triceps at the end of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rear pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position.
Step:2 Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:5 Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the cable back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso abdominal
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down facing up on a mat.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
Step:4 While keeping your upper body stable, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the mat.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso grip tríceps pushdown (sz-bar) (with braço blaster)
name_en: cable reverse grip triceps pushdown (sz-bar) (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and slowly push the bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso unilateral rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso preacher rosca
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended.
Step:3 Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso wrist rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso-grip pushdown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Using your triceps, push the bar down until your arms are fully extended and your triceps are contracted.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia reverso-grip straight costas sentado high remada
name_en: cable reverse-grip straight back seated high row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the seat facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from your hips.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope crossover sentado remada
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable ropes towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope elevated sentado remada
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the elevated seat facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grab the cable rope handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully contracted position.
Step:6 Slowly release the tension and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope extensão inclinado supino remada
name_en: cable rope extension incline bench row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable machine to the low pulley.
Step:2 Attach a rope handle to the cable machine and sit on the incline bench facing the machine.
Step:3 Grab the rope handle with an overhand grip and lean forward, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, pulling the rope towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope hammer preacher rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the rope back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope high pulley acima da cabeça tríceps extensão
name_en: cable rope high pulley overhead tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the weight accordingly.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down, and bring your hands above your head.
Step:4 Keep your upper arms close to your head and perpendicular to the floor.
Step:5 Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope inclinado tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope deitado on floor tríceps extensão
name_en: cable rope lying on floor tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine and set it to the lowest position.
Step:2 Lie on the floor facing up, with your head towards the cable machine.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Keep your upper arms stationary and slowly lower the rope towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rope unilateral hammer preacher rosca
name_en: cable rope one arm hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:4 Position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Slowly curl the rope handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:7 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the rope handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Na polia rope sentado remada
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pull the cable ropes towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia russian twists (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Twist your torso to the right, bringing the cable handle towards your right hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the cable handle towards your left hip.
Step:6 Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado peito supino
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and cable handles to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back straight and feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip at shoulder height.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado abdominal
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it behind your head.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado rosca
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado high remada (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing each other, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado unilateral alternate remada
name_en: cable seated one arm alternate row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your arm fully extended in front of you.
Step:3 Pull the handle towards your body, retracting your shoulder blade and keeping your elbow close to your side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado unilateral concentration rosca
name_en: cable seated one arm concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Na polia sentado acima da cabeça rosca
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado rear lateral elevação
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado remada
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado ombro internal rotation
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down.
Step:4 Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Na polia sentado rotação
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged, slowly rotate your torso to one side, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the range of motion, then slowly rotate back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia sentado pegada aberta remada
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia ombro supino
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the handles are at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them up to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and pointing outwards.
Step:4 Press the handles upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Encolhimento na polia
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and let your arms hang down in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia lateral bend
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia lateral bend abdominal (bosu ball)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a cable handle in one hand.
Step:2 Place the other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the hand holding the cable, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia lateral abdominal
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand sideways to the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with the hand furthest from the machine and place your other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Keep your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 With your abs engaged, bend sideways at the waist, bringing your elbow down towards your hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia agachamento remada (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia squatting rosca
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to the lowest setting on a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and knees behind your toes.
Step:5 As you squat down, curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the curl, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé costas wrist rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé panturrilha elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé cross-over high reverso fly
name_en: cable standing cross-over high reverse fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé abdominal
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé abdominal (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables.
Step:5 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest.
Step:7 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:8 Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé hip extensão
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat with the other leg.

name: Na polia em pé inner rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé lift
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it at waist height.
Step:3 Engage your core and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the cable handle up towards your opposite shoulder, rotating your torso.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Na polia em pé unilateral tríceps extensão
name_en: cable standing one arm triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.

name: Na polia em pé one perna panturrilha elevação
name_en: cable standing one leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine for support.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground and balance on the other leg.
Step:4 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: Na polia em pé pulldown (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the rope back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé rear delt remada (with rope)
name_en: cable standing rear delt row (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable attachment with both hands, palms facing each other, and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé reverso grip unilateral acima da cabeça tríceps extensão
name_en: cable standing reverse grip one arm overhead tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and extend your arm overhead, keeping your elbow close to your head.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm stationary and slowly lower the cable handle behind your head by bending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Na polia em pé remada (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé ombro external rotation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your arm extended in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back.
Step:4 Slowly rotate your arm outward, away from your body, while keeping your elbow in the same position.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia em pé rotação remada (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Take a step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:7 As you pull, twist your torso to one side, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your upper back.
Step:9 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position, untwisting your torso.
Step:10 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, alternating the twisting direction with each rep.

name: Na polia em pé up straight crossovers
instructions: Step:1 Stand in the middle of a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the handles of the cables with your palms facing down and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, bring your hands together in front of your body, crossing them over each other.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position, keeping your arms extended.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia straight braço pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia straight braço pulldown (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia straight costas sentado remada
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the cable handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia supine reverso fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench.
Step:2 Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia thibaudeau kayak remada
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your right hand and extend your arm fully, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:3 Lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blade and bending your elbow, keeping your arm close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your left arm.

name: Na polia tríceps pushdown (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Step:7 Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia tríceps pushdown (v-bar) (with braço blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Step:7 Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia tuck reverso abdominal
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down on a mat facing up.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 At the same time, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rotação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and twist your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling the contraction in your abs and obliques.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position, resisting the cable's pull.
Step:6 Repeat the movement to the left side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia rotação (up-down)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the rotation to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia twisting puxada
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your left hand and step away from the machine, extending your arm fully.
Step:3 Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your torso to the right as you do so.
Step:6 Squeeze your back muscles at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly return to the starting position, keeping tension on the cable.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your right hand.

name: Na polia two braço rosca on inclinado supino
name_en: cable two arm curl on incline bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia two braço tríceps kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia underhand pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Step:2 Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na polia upper peito crossovers
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core.
