name_en: dumbbell single leg deadlift with stepbox support
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Place your left foot on a stepbox or elevated surface behind you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, lowering the dumbbell towards the ground.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbell, simultaneously lift your left leg behind you, maintaining a straight line from head to heel.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell until you feel a stretch in your right hamstring, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Com halter single perna split agachamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with one foot and position your feet so that your front foot is flat on the ground and your back foot is elevated on a bench or step.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, keeping your back knee slightly bent and your back heel off the ground.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: Com halter single perna agachamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: Com halter agachamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé alternate hammer rosca and supino
name_en: dumbbell standing alternate hammer curl and press
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your back straight.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the curl with your left hand.
Step:7 After completing the curl with your left hand, exhale and press the dumbbell in your right hand overhead.
Step:8 Extend your arm fully and hold for a moment at the top.
Step:9 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:10 Repeat the press with your left hand.
Step:11 Continue alternating between curls and presses for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé alternate acima da cabeça supino
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé alternate elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise one dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé alternating tríceps kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides with each repetition.

name: Com halter em pé around world
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly rotate your arms in a circular motion, bringing the dumbbells in front of your body and then overhead.
Step:4 Continue the circular motion, bringing the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé curvado unilateral tríceps extensão
name_en: dumbbell standing bent over one arm triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Com halter em pé curvado two braço tríceps extensão
name_en: dumbbell standing bent over two arm triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé bíceps rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé panturrilha elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé concentration rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Com halter em pé frontal elevação above head
name_en: dumbbell standing front raise above head
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé inner bíceps rosca v. 2
name_en: dumbbell standing inner biceps curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 While holding your upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in.
Step:7 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé unilateral concentration rosca
name_en: dumbbell standing one arm concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Place your free hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Com halter em pé unilateral rosca (over inclinado supino)
name_en: dumbbell standing one arm curl (over incline bench)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing forward.
Step:2 Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Com halter em pé unilateral rosca over inclinado supino
name_en: dumbbell standing one arm curl over incline bench
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: Com halter em pé unilateral extensão
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé unilateral palm in supino
name_en: dumbbell standing one arm palm in press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Com halter em pé unilateral reverso rosca
name_en: dumbbell standing one arm reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arm fully extended and close to your body, with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: Com halter em pé acima da cabeça supino
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé palms in supino
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé preacher rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé reverso rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.

Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your arm straight.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter em pé zottman preacher rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter step up single perna balance with bíceps rosca
name_en: dumbbell step up single leg balance with bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground.
Step:6 Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter step-up
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the bench or step, straightening your right leg.
Step:4 Bring your left foot up onto the bench or step, standing fully upright.
Step:5 Step back down with your left foot, followed by your right foot, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: Com halter step-up avanço
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface.
Step:3 Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well.
Step:4 Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time.
Step:6 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter step-up split agachamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Step up onto the bench or step with your right foot, pushing through your heel to lift your body up.
Step:4 As you step up, simultaneously lift your left knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your left foot back to the ground while keeping your right foot on the bench or step.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left foot on the bench or step.
Step:7 Continue alternating between your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter stiff perna deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter straight braço pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter straight perna deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward.
Step:3 Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter sumo puxada through
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body.
Step:6 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter supported agachamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter tate supino
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height.
Step:4 Rotate your wrists back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter tríceps kickback with stork stance
name_en: dumbbell tricep kickback with stork stance
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Com halter twisting supino supino
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face towards you at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then reverse the movement by pressing the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 As you press the dumbbells up, twist your wrists back to the starting position with palms facing away from you.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter upright remada
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter upright remada (costas pov)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter upright ombro external rotation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter waiter bíceps rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter w-supino
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter zottman rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Com halter zottman preacher rosca
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad.
Step:2 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up.
Step:3 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dumbbells sentado tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:4 Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Dynamic peito alongamento (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly bring your arms forward, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 10-30 seconds.
Step:6 Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Elbow dips
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Step:2 Slide your hips forward off the bench and straighten your legs, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Elbow lift - reverso empurrar-up
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the ground with your legs extended and your hands placed directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and press through your palms to lift your upper body off the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Pause at the top for a moment, squeezing your upper back muscles.
Step:4 Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Elbow-to-knee
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and your right knee towards your left elbow.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Elevator
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Place your hands on your hips or cross them in front of your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the waist, lowering your upper body towards the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your upper body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball alternating braço ups
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball costas extensão with arms extended
name_en: exercise ball back extension with arms extended
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight and your neck in line with your spine.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball costas extensão with hands behind head
name_en: exercise ball back extension with hands behind head
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it with your hips resting on the ball.
Step:2 Position your feet against a wall or other stable surface for support.
Step:3 Cross your arms behind your head, with your hands touching the back of your head.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball costas extensão with knees off ground
name_en: exercise ball back extension with knees off ground
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball costas extensão with rotation
name_en: exercise ball back extension with rotation
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Step:5 Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:6 Lower your upper body back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball dip
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms.
Step:4 Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball hip flexor alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

name: Exercise ball hug
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the stability ball with both hands, hugging it close to your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight and your feet planted on the ground.
Step:4 Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your back muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball dorsal alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up overhead.
Step:3 Slowly lean to the opposite side, feeling a stretch in your lat muscle.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

name: Exercise ball lower costas alongamento (pyramid)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball down your back until your lower back is resting on the ball.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, allowing your lower back to stretch over the ball.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball deitado lateral dorsal alongamento
name_en: exercise ball lying side lat stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your top arm on the ball for stability.
Step:3 Reach your top arm overhead and allow your torso to rotate slightly.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your lat muscles on the side of your body.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

name: Exercise ball on the wall panturrilha elevação
name_en: exercise ball on the wall calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball on the wall panturrilha elevação (tennis ball between ankles)
name_en: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between ankles)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your ankles.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball on the wall panturrilha elevação (tennis ball between knees)
name_en: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between knees)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your knees.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball one perna prone lower body rotation
name_en: exercise ball one leg prone lower body rotation
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Step:4 Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the rotation with the other leg.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball one legged diagonal chute posterior rosca
name_en: exercise ball one legged diagonal kick hamstring curl
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels.
Step:4 Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed.
Step:5 Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings.
Step:6 Slowly return your right leg to the starting position, maintaining control and stability.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball pike empurrar up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands on the floor and your shins resting on the stability ball.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, rolling the ball towards your hands.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and your body in a pike position, forming an inverted V shape.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the floor, keeping your head in line with your hands.
Step:5 Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball prone perna elevação
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat with your legs extended and your toes resting on top of the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart, and engage your core muscles.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, slowly lift them off the ground, using your lower back and glutes to raise them as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball sentado posterior alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you.
Step:3 Place your hands on your hips for support.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted.
Step:5 Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your heels and using your hamstrings to pull yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Exercise ball sentado tríceps alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.

name: Exercise ball supine tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Ez bar french supino on exercise ball
name_en: ez bar french press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold an EZ barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Ez bar deitado bent arms pullover
name_en: ez bar lying bent arms pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Ez bar deitado close grip tríceps extensão behind head
name_en: ez bar lying close grip triceps extension behind head
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Ez bar reverso grip curvado remada
name_en: ez bar reverse grip bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pull the ez barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Ez bar sentado close grip concentration rosca
name_en: ez bar seated close grip concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever sentado reverso fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever sentado reverso fly (parallel grip)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever sentado remada
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet on the footrests.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever sentado agachamento panturrilha elevação on perna supino na máquina
name_en: lever seated squat calf raise on leg press machine
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the footplate, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the footplate, keeping your heels off the edge.
Step:4 Release the safety handles and push the footplate away from you by extending your knees.
Step:5 Once your knees are fully extended, slowly lower your heels by flexing your calves.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the footplate back up by extending your calves.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever ombro supino
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at shoulder level.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever ombro supino v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever ombro supino v. 3
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever encolhimento
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever em pé panturrilha elevação
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever em pé peito supino
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever t bar remada
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever t-bar reverso grip remada
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lever unilateral remada
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: London bridge
instructions: Step:1 Attach the rope to a high anchor point.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Low glúteo bridge on floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Lower costas rosca
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Avanço with salto
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Push off with your right foot and jump into the air, switching the position of your feet mid-air.
Step:4 Land softly with your left foot forward and immediately lower your body into a lunge position.
Step:5 Continue alternating between lunges and jumps for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Avanço with rotação
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge, twist your torso to the right, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping forward with your left foot and twisting your torso to the left.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Deitado (lateral) quads alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs straight.
Step:2 Bend your top leg and grab your ankle or foot with your hand.
Step:3 Gently pull your ankle or foot towards your glutes until you feel a stretch in your quads.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.

name: Deitado elbow to knee
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 At the same time, extend your right leg straight out and lift it off the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and extending your left leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Deitado perna elevação flat supino
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Deitado perna-hip elevação
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Na máquina inner peito supino
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: March sit (wall)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Slowly slide your back down the wall until your knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Lift your right foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Step:4 Lower your right foot back down and lift your left foot off the ground, bringing your knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Continue alternating between lifting your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball catch and acima da cabeça throw
name_en: medicine ball catch and overhead throw
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball in both hands at chest level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips and legs, while simultaneously throwing the medicine ball overhead.
Step:5 Release the ball at the top of the movement and catch it on the way down.
Step:6 Lower your body back into the squat position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball peito pass
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest with force.
Step:3 As you release the ball, follow through with your arms and torso, transferring your weight from your back foot to your front foot.
Step:4 Catch the ball as it rebounds off the wall or partner, and immediately repeat the movement.
Step:5 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball peito empurrar from 3 point stance
name_en: medicine ball chest push from 3 point stance
instructions: Step:1 Start in a 3 point stance with one hand on the medicine ball and the other hand on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your legs and position your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Push the medicine ball away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball peito empurrar multiple response
name_en: medicine ball chest push multiple response
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball peito empurrar single response
name_en: medicine ball chest push single response
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball peito empurrar with run release
name_en: medicine ball chest push with run release
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot and simultaneously push the medicine ball forward, extending your arms fully.
Step:3 As you push the ball forward, release it and let it roll forward.
Step:4 Quickly run forward and catch the ball before it hits the ground.
Step:5 Once you catch the ball, bring it back to your chest and repeat the movement with your left foot forward.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs and repeating the exercise for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball close grip empurrar up
name_en: medicine ball close grip push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball acima da cabeça slam
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball with both hands above your head.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground in front of you.
Step:4 As you slam the ball down, use your entire body to generate power, including your shoulders and core.
Step:5 Catch the ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Medicine ball supine peito throw
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a bench with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the medicine ball with both hands, extending your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the medicine ball towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Explosively push the medicine ball upwards, extending your arms fully and throwing the ball as high as possible.
Step:5 Catch the medicine ball and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Mixed grip chin-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Modified hindu empurrar-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Modified empurrar up to lower arms
name_en: modified push up to lower arms
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body down towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Once your elbows are at a 90-degree angle, lower your forearms to the ground, keeping your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to lift your forearms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Monster walk
instructions: Step:1 Place a resistance band around your ankles.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Step:3 Take a step to the side with your right foot, maintaining tension on the resistance band.
Step:4 Follow with your left foot, stepping to the side to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: Mountain climber
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and bring your right knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring your left knee towards your chest.
Step:3 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, keeping your hips low and your core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and breathe evenly throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Muscle up
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you.
Step:4 Continue pulling yourself up until your chest is above the bar and your arms are fully flexed.
Step:5 Reverse the movement by slowly lowering yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Muscle-up (on vertical bar)
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a vertical bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 As you pull yourself up, lean back slightly and bring your elbows towards your sides.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chest reaches the bar and your elbows are fully bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Narrow empurrar-up on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the ball, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Neck lateral alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed.
Step:2 Tilt your head to one side, bringing your ear towards your shoulder.
Step:3 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Perform 2-4 sets on each side.

name: Negative abdominal
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Oblique abdominal v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the ground, rotating your torso to one side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Oblique crunches floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the floor, rotating your torso to one side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the floor.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, alternating sides with each repetition.

name: Olympic com barra hammer rosca
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold an Olympic barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Olympic com barra tríceps extensão
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Unilateral against wall
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall.
Step:3 Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat.
Step:4 Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.

name: Unilateral chin-up
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

name: Unilateral dip
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Step:3 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

name: Unilateral slam (with medicine ball)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball with one hand in front of your waist.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise the medicine ball above your head, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 Forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground, using your core and shoulders to generate power.
Step:5 Catch the medicine ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Unilateral towel remada
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully, allowing the towel to hang in front of you.
Step:4 Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: One perna donkey panturrilha elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place your hands on a stable surface for support, such as a wall or a bar.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

name: One perna floor panturrilha elevação
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place your hands on a wall or sturdy object for balance.
Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto the ball of your foot.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: One perna agachamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg.

name: Otis up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Outside perna chute empurrar-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 As you push back up, kick one leg out to the side, extending it fully and engaging your glutes.
Step:4 Return your leg to the starting position and repeat the push-up, alternating legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue alternating leg kicks and push-ups for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Acima da cabeça tríceps alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade.
Step:3 With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

name: Pelvic tilt
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your abs and tilt your pelvis upward, pressing your lower back into the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your abs.
Step:5 Release the tilt and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pelvic tilt into bridge
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground.
Step:5 Hold the bridge position for a few seconds.
Step:6 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Peroneals alongamento
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Step:3 Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the tension on the rope and repeat the stretch on the other leg.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pike-to-cobra empurrar-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, forming an inverted V shape with your body.
